cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out why Ms. Leibfried asked the author to recite a passage in front of the class. Let me go through the passage again to get the context. The author mentions that she was an introverted, shy student, the only non-white student, and felt out of place. She found solace in reading and writing. Ms. Leibfried noticed her interest and offered her favorite
